enrichment.short_description: Action-based lead management software that captures leads from multiple channels and tracks them through a visual sales pipeline to close.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: noCRM.io is action-based lead management software with pipeline tracking, call/VoIP tools, and 3,000+ integrations via Zapier.

features.title: Visual pipeline
features.description: Drag-and-drop pipeline for organizing and tracking leads through each sales stage.

features.title: Multi-channel lead capture
features.description: Import leads from email, forms, WhatsApp, phone, and business cards into one pipeline.

features.title: Smart follow-up reminders
features.description: Automated next-action reminders synced to your calendar so no lead is forgotten.

features.title: Call tracking and VoIP
features.description: Built-in call tracking, recording, and VoIP integration for telesales teams.

features.title: Quotes and invoices
features.description: Generate and send quotes and invoices directly from a lead's record.

features.title: Team reporting
features.description: Reporting dashboards for tracking rep and team performance.

features.title: Zapier integrations
features.description: Connects to over 3,000 third-party apps through Zapier.

features.title: Mobile apps
features.description: iOS and Android apps with offline functionality for field sales.

pros: Action-oriented workflow keeps reps focused on the next step instead of admin
Captures leads from WhatsApp, email, forms, and phone in one place
Mobile apps work offline for field and telesales reps
Built-in quote and invoice generation without extra tools
Large integration library via Zapier
cons: Exact plan pricing is not published on the site and requires visiting the live pricing calculator
No permanent free plan, only a free trial
Starter plan is capped at 500 leads in one pipeline and 4 custom fields

faqs.question: Does noCRM.io offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 15-day free trial is available with no credit card required, extendable to 30 days by adding payment details.

faqs.question: What plans does noCRM.io offer?
faqs.answer: Three tiers: Starter, Expert, and Dream, billed monthly or yearly with up to 40% savings on annual billing.

faqs.question: Can I capture leads from WhatsApp?
faqs.answer: Yes, noCRM.io syncs WhatsApp conversations into the lead pipeline.

faqs.question: Does noCRM.io have mobile apps?
faqs.answer: Yes, iOS and Android apps are available with offline functionality.

use_cases.title: Solo sales pipeline
use_cases.description: Track and prioritize leads without setting up a full CRM.

use_cases.title: Telesales follow-up
use_cases.description: Use call tracking and automated reminders to work through call lists.

use_cases.title: Small sales team management
use_cases.description: Give managers pipeline visibility and performance reporting across reps.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is noCRM.io?
paragraphs: noCRM.io is a sales pipeline tool built around actions rather than data entry. It lets salespeople pull leads in from email, forms, phone, and WhatsApp, then work them through a visual pipeline with reminders for the next step.
Beyond pipeline tracking, it includes call tracking with VoIP, quote and invoice generation, and team performance reporting, plus over 3,000 integrations through Zapier.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who noCRM.io is for
paragraphs: It suits solopreneurs and small-to-medium sales teams, including telesales and telemarketing operations, who want a lightweight tool focused on closing leads rather than managing a heavier traditional CRM.

name: Really Simple Systems
skip_reason: Official site (reallysimplesystems.com) was unreachable across three separate attempts (homepage, /pricing/, /features/), each returning an HTTP 522 origin-timeout error, so no facts could be verified directly from the source.

enrichment.short_description: Daylite is a native Mac, iPhone, and iPad CRM and business management app that links email, calendar, tasks, and deals to contacts and projects.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Daylite is Mac/iPhone/iPad-native CRM software that unifies contacts, email, calendar, tasks, and a sales pipeline for service businesses.

features.title: CRM and client management
features.description: Links every email, meeting, note, and task to the relevant contact automatically.

features.title: Email integration
features.description: Inbox built into the CRM with Priority Inbox and Smart Suggestions.

features.title: Opportunities Board
features.description: Visual pipeline for tracking sales opportunities to close.

features.title: Project and task management
features.description: Structured project tracking with tasks linked to contacts and deals.

features.title: Calendar and notes
features.description: Calendar, tasks, and notes are interconnected with contact and project records.

features.title: Offline access
features.description: Work on records offline with sync when a connection is restored.

pros: Deep native integration with Mac, iPhone, and iPad rather than a web wrapper
Automatically links emails, meetings, and notes to contacts and projects
Combines CRM, project management, and email in one app
Offline access with automatic sync
cons: Only available on Mac, iPhone, and iPad; no Windows, Android, or standalone web app
Pricing is not published on the homepage
Requires the Apple ecosystem, which limits cross-platform teams

faqs.question: What platforms does Daylite run on?
faqs.answer: Daylite is built natively for Mac, iPhone, and iPad.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Who makes Daylite?
faqs.answer: Daylite is made by Marketcircle Inc.

faqs.question: Does Daylite work offline?
faqs.answer: Yes, users can work on records offline and Daylite syncs once reconnected.

use_cases.title: Client relationship tracking for consultants
use_cases.description: Keep a full history of emails, meetings, and notes tied to each client.

use_cases.title: Real estate and legal pipelines
use_cases.description: Track deals and cases through a visual Opportunities Board.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Daylite?
paragraphs: Daylite is a CRM and business management app built specifically for Mac, iPhone, and iPad. It consolidates contacts, email, calendar, tasks, notes, and a sales pipeline into one connected system.
Every email, meeting, and task is automatically linked to the relevant contact, project, or opportunity, giving a searchable history without switching between separate apps.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Daylite is for
paragraphs: It targets service-based small businesses in the Apple ecosystem, such as attorneys, real estate agents, consultants, and photographers, who sell their time and expertise.

enrichment.short_description: Kylas is a sales CRM with a free lifetime plan, pipeline management, AI lead scoring, and unlimited users on every plan.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Kylas is a sales CRM with a free forever plan, pipeline management, AI lead scoring, and unlimited users across all plans.

features.title: Pipeline management
features.description: Customizable pipelines to track leads and deals through each stage.

features.title: AI-powered tools
features.description: Call sentiment analysis, AI chatbot, lead scoring, and automation agents.

features.title: Communication hub
features.description: Unified tracking of emails, SMS, WhatsApp, and meetings in one record.

features.title: Field sales management
features.description: Real-time visibility into field sales rep activity.

features.title: Quotation management
features.description: Generate and track quotes directly from deal records.

features.title: Reporting dashboards
features.description: Dynamic dashboards covering leads, deals, tasks, and revenue projections.

features.title: Marketplace integrations
features.description: 350+ marketplace apps including WhatsApp Business and Facebook Lead Ads.

pros: Lifetime-free Embark plan with no per-user cost
Unlimited users on every plan, including paid tiers
Built-in AI lead scoring and call sentiment analysis
Large marketplace of 350+ app integrations
Mobile apps for iOS and Android
cons: Free Embark plan caps records at 10,000 and storage at 5GB with no email or telephony features
Paid Elevate plan pricing is not publicly disclosed on the pricing page
Top-tier Exceed plan requires contacting sales for custom pricing

faqs.question: Is Kylas free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Embark plan is free for life with up to 10,000 records and 5GB of storage, though it lacks email, telephony, and advanced automation.

faqs.question: Does Kylas charge per user?
faqs.answer: No, all Kylas plans, including paid tiers, include unlimited users with no per-seat cost.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Elevate plan offers a 7-day free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What integrations does Kylas support?
faqs.answer: Kylas offers 350+ marketplace apps, including WhatsApp Business and Facebook Lead Ads.

use_cases.title: Free CRM for small teams
use_cases.description: Start on the Embark plan to manage leads and contacts at no cost.

use_cases.title: Field sales tracking
use_cases.description: Give managers real-time visibility into field rep activity and performance.

features: Phone support and dedicated account manager

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Kylas?
paragraphs: Kylas is a sales CRM that combines pipeline management with AI-powered tools like call sentiment analysis and lead scoring. It unifies email, SMS, WhatsApp, and meeting activity into a single communication hub.
The product is notable for offering unlimited users on every plan, including a lifetime-free Embark tier, positioned as a 'pay as you grow' model.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Kylas is for
paragraphs: Kylas targets growing B2B sales teams across manufacturing, digital marketing, IT, fintech, edtech, insurance, and travel.

enrichment.short_description: RevenueCat is a subscription management backend that unifies in-app purchase infrastructure, paywalls, and analytics across iOS, Android, and web.
enrichment.starting_price: Free up to $2,500 monthly tracked revenue, then 1% of tracked revenue
enrichment.seo_meta_description: RevenueCat is a subscription backend for apps, unifying purchase infrastructure, paywalls, and analytics across StoreKit, Google Play, and web.

features.title: Subscription backend
features.description: Streamlines purchase setup and automates receipt validation across StoreKit, Google Play, smart TV, and web.

features.title: Paywall management
features.description: Pre-built, configurable paywall templates with a layer-driven editor.

features.title: A/B testing
features.description: Remotely configurable A/B tests with full-funnel analytics.

features.title: Customer analytics
features.description: Predictive analytics and campaign performance tracking.

features.title: Support tools
features.description: A unified view of subscription data with automated refund handling.

features.title: Web-to-app campaigns
features.description: Direct conversion tools for web-to-app purchase funnels.

pros: Free tier covers apps up to $2,500 in monthly tracked revenue
Single SDK covers iOS, Android, smart TV, and web purchases
Built-in paywall editor and A/B testing without extra tooling
Proven at scale, used by 117K+ apps processing $15B+ in revenue
cons: Revenue-share pricing (1% of tracked revenue) can add up for larger apps
Enterprise-level volume pricing requires a custom quote
Built around in-app purchase billing rather than general SaaS invoicing

faqs.question: Is RevenueCat free?
faqs.answer: Yes, it's free for apps tracking up to $2,500 in monthly revenue; above that it costs 1% of tracked revenue.

faqs.question: What platforms does RevenueCat support?
faqs.answer: iOS, Android, smart TVs, and web purchases.

faqs.question: Does RevenueCat include paywall tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers a configurable paywall editor and remote A/B testing.

faqs.question: Is there an enterprise plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, RevenueCat offers custom Enterprise pricing with volume discounts and dedicated support.

use_cases.title: In-app purchase infrastructure
use_cases.description: Handle receipt validation and entitlements across app stores without building it in-house.

use_cases.title: Paywall experimentation
use_cases.description: A/B test paywall designs and pricing to improve conversion.

pricing_plans.price: Free up to $2,500 MTR, then 1% of tracked revenue

long_form_blocks.heading: What is RevenueCat?
paragraphs: RevenueCat is a subscription backend that handles in-app purchase infrastructure so mobile teams don't have to build receipt validation and entitlement logic themselves across StoreKit, Google Play, and web.
On top of the backend, it adds paywall templates, A/B testing, and customer analytics used to track and grow subscription revenue.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who RevenueCat is for
paragraphs: It serves engineering, product, marketing, support, and data teams at companies that monetize apps through in-app subscriptions.

enrichment.short_description: ChartMogul is subscription analytics software that consolidates MRR, churn, and forecasting data from multiple billing systems into one dashboard.
enrichment.starting_price: Free up to $10K MRR; paid plans from $59/month
enrichment.seo_meta_description: ChartMogul is subscription analytics software that unifies MRR, churn, and forecasting from Stripe, Chargebee, and other billing systems.

features.title: Multi-billing consolidation
features.description: Connects billing systems like Stripe, Chargebee, and App Store Connect into one metrics view.

features.title: Revenue analytics
features.description: Tracks MRR, ARR, churn, and LTV in real time.

features.title: Product-led growth tracking
features.description: Unifies trial and billing data for PLG conversion analysis.

features.title: Multi-currency revenue tracking
features.description: Shows revenue with visibility into exchange-rate impact.

features.title: Workflow automation
features.description: Triggers workflows automatically from subscription events.

features.title: Cohort analysis
features.description: Segments and analyzes customers by cohort.

features.title: Lightweight CRM
features.description: Includes a basic built-in CRM with two-way sync on higher plans.

pros: Free plan available for businesses up to $10K MRR
Combines data from multiple billing systems in one dashboard
Publishes SaaS benchmark research used for industry comparison
Includes a built-in CRM rather than requiring a separate tool
cons: Paid plan prices scale with ARR band and can reach $1,199/month on Pro
Enterprise plans start at $19,900/year
Additional CRM Pro seats cost $39/user/month on top of the base plan

faqs.question: Does ChartMogul have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, it's free for companies up to $10K MRR / $120K ARR with core analytics features.

faqs.question: What billing systems does ChartMogul connect to?
faqs.answer: Stripe, Chargebee, and App Store Connect, among others, depending on plan.

faqs.question: Does ChartMogul offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Is there an Enterprise plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, priced from $19,900/year for companies over $10M ARR, billed annually.

use_cases.title: SaaS growth metrics
use_cases.description: Monitor MRR, churn, and LTV across billing systems in one place.

use_cases.title: Investor reporting
use_cases.description: Produce investor-grade recurring revenue metrics for board updates.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ChartMogul?
paragraphs: ChartMogul is subscription analytics software used by over 3,000 SaaS companies to track recurring revenue metrics like MRR, ARR, churn, and LTV in one dashboard.

It pulls data from multiple billing systems and payment providers, handles complex billing scenarios like usage-based overages and multi-currency revenue, and layers in forecasting and industry benchmarks.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ChartMogul is for
paragraphs: It's built for SaaS founders and operators who need consolidated, real-time visibility into subscription revenue across one or more billing systems.

enrichment.short_description: Baremetrics is subscription analytics software that tracks MRR, churn, and forecasting, and automates failed-payment recovery for SaaS businesses.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Baremetrics is subscription analytics software with 28+ SaaS metrics, financial forecasting, and payment recovery for Stripe and Chargebee.

features.title: Control Center
features.description: At-a-glance dashboard of key subscription business metrics.

features.title: Smart Dashboards
features.description: Deep-dive analysis of growth drivers with historical comparisons.

features.title: Financial forecasting
features.description: Revenue projections for planning and budgeting.

features.title: Cancellation insights
features.description: Identifies why customers cancel and automates retention campaigns.

features.title: Payment recovery
features.description: Manages failed charges to reduce delinquent churn (paid add-on).

features.title: Segmentation
features.description: Profiles and segments customers by behavior.

features.title: Benchmarking
features.description: Compares performance against similar subscription companies.

pros: 28+ prebuilt subscription metrics out of the box
Direct integrations with Stripe, Braintree, Recurly, Chargebee, Paddle, and app stores
35% discount available for annual billing
Dedicated add-ons for payment recovery and cancellation insights
cons: No permanent free plan, only a free trial
Payment Recovery and Cancellation Insights each cost an extra $129/month
Pricing scales with ARR and reaches $1,152/month on the Scale plan

faqs.question: What billing systems does Baremetrics support?
faqs.answer: Stripe, Braintree, Recurly, Chargebee, Google Play, App Store Connect, Shopify, and Paddle.

faqs.question: Does Baremetrics have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but a free trial is available before subscribing to a paid plan.

faqs.question: What does the Launch plan include?
faqs.answer: It costs $75/month for businesses up to $360K ARR and includes 28+ subscription metrics, trial insights, and one billing integration.

faqs.question: Are Payment Recovery and Cancellation Insights included?
faqs.answer: No, they are paid add-ons at $129/month each.

use_cases.title: Recovering failed payments
use_cases.description: Automatically retry and recover failed subscription charges.

use_cases.title: Churn analysis
use_cases.description: Understand why customers cancel and trigger retention campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Baremetrics?
paragraphs: Baremetrics is subscription analytics software that surfaces metrics like MRR, churn, and LTV for subscription businesses, alongside financial forecasting and customer segmentation.
It also offers paid add-ons for recovering failed payments and understanding why customers cancel, aimed at reducing revenue loss.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Baremetrics is for
paragraphs: It's aimed at SaaS and other subscription-based businesses that bill through Stripe, Chargebee, Recurly, or similar providers and want consolidated revenue analytics.

enrichment.short_description: Maxio is billing and revenue recognition software for B2B SaaS companies, automating subscription billing, invoicing, and GAAP/IFRS reporting.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Maxio is billing software for B2B SaaS, handling usage-based billing, invoicing, revenue recognition, and financial reporting.

features.title: Usage-based billing
features.description: Metering and rating for usage-based subscription billing.

features.title: Self-serve billing portals
features.description: Customer-facing portals with flexible product catalogs.

features.title: Payment gateway integrations
features.description: 20+ built-in payment gateway integrations.

features.title: Revenue recognition
features.description: GAAP- and IFRS-compliant revenue recognition and custom reporting.

features.title: AR automation
features.description: Accounts receivable management with dunning automation.

features.title: CPQ
features.description: Configure, Price, Quote functionality for sales teams.

features.title: Multi-entity management
features.description: Supports billing across multiple entities or subsidiaries.

pros: Handles complex usage-based and multi-entity billing scenarios
Built-in GAAP/IFRS revenue recognition rather than a bolt-on tool
85+ native integrations plus 6,000+ via Zapier, including NetSuite and Salesforce
Published customer results such as 90% faster reporting for one customer
cons: Pricing is not public and requires requesting a demo
No free trial or free plan mentioned on the site
Geared toward established B2B SaaS companies rather than solo founders or small teams

faqs.question: What is Maxio used for?
faqs.answer: Subscription billing, invoicing, revenue recognition, and financial reporting for B2B SaaS companies.

faqs.question: Does Maxio support usage-based billing?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes metering and rating for usage-based billing models.

faqs.question: What accounting standards does Maxio support?
faqs.answer: GAAP and IFRS revenue recognition compliance.

faqs.question: How do I get pricing for Maxio?
faqs.answer: Pricing isn't published; you need to request a demo.

use_cases.title: Usage-based billing for AI/SaaS
use_cases.description: Meter and bill customers based on product usage.

use_cases.title: Multi-entity revenue reporting
use_cases.description: Consolidate revenue recognition across multiple subsidiaries.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Maxio?
paragraphs: Maxio is a billing and financial reporting platform for B2B SaaS and AI companies. It automates subscription billing, contract management, invoicing, and revenue recognition compliant with GAAP and IFRS.
It also includes CPQ functionality, dunning automation for accounts receivable, and customizable reporting dashboards with drill-down capability.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Maxio is for
paragraphs: It targets finance, product, and engineering teams at B2B SaaS and AI companies with complex billing needs, such as usage-based pricing or multi-entity structures.

enrichment.short_description: Ortto combines marketing automation, a customer data platform, and support tools like live chat into one system for building customer journeys.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Ortto combines marketing automation, customer data, analytics, and live chat support tools into one platform for building customer journeys.

features.title: Marketing automation journeys
features.description: Build automated journeys across email, SMS, push notifications, forms, and surveys.

features.title: Customer data platform
features.description: Custom activities, dashboards, custom reports, and lead scoring.

features.title: Support and engagement
features.description: Team inbox, AI-powered responses, live chat, calls, and screen sharing.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Dashboards and custom reporting on customer and campaign data.

features.title: No-code integrations
features.description: Connects to Google Ads, Facebook, Salesforce, Shopify, Zendesk, HubSpot, and 50+ other platforms.

pros: Combines marketing automation, CDP, and live-chat support in one platform
No-code integrations with major CRM and ecommerce platforms
Multi-channel journeys covering email, SMS, push, and in-app messages
Fast onboarding, advertised as roughly 2 minutes
cons: Official pricing page was inaccessible at the time of review, so current plan pricing could not be verified from the source
No free plan mentioned, only a 14-day free trial
Previously operated as Autopilot before rebranding, which may cause confusion for legacy users

faqs.question: Does Ortto offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available.

faqs.question: What channels can Ortto journeys use?
faqs.answer: Email, SMS, push notifications, forms, surveys, and in-app messages.

faqs.question: Does Ortto include customer support tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes a team inbox, live chat, AI-powered responses, and screen sharing.

faqs.question: Was Ortto previously called something else?
faqs.answer: Yes, the site notes 'Autopilot is now Ortto,' indicating a rebrand.

use_cases.title: Customer journey automation
use_cases.description: Trigger multi-channel messages based on customer behavior.

use_cases.title: Unified customer data and support
use_cases.description: Combine customer data with live chat and team inbox for support teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Ortto?
paragraphs: Ortto is a platform that combines marketing automation, a customer data platform, analytics, and customer support tools. It lets teams build customer journeys across email, SMS, push, forms, and surveys.
It also includes support features like a team inbox, AI-powered responses, and live chat, plus no-code integrations with tools like Salesforce, Shopify, and HubSpot.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Ortto is for
paragraphs: Ortto serves organizations of varying sizes, from startups to enterprises, across verticals including SaaS, financial services, healthcare, and nonprofits.

enrichment.short_description: Encharge is marketing automation software for B2B SaaS that triggers behavior-based emails and workflows through a visual flow builder.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Encharge is marketing automation for B2B SaaS with a visual flow builder, behavior-based emails, and 50+ integrations including HubSpot and Salesforce.

features.title: Flow Builder
features.description: Visual drag-and-drop interface for building automation workflows.

features.title: Behavior-based emails
features.description: Trigger targeted messages based on user actions or inactivity.

features.title: User segmentation
features.description: Segment users by product behavior, pageviews, and third-party data.

features.title: User profiles
features.description: Real-time visibility into customer actions and interactions.

features.title: HTML-free email editor
features.description: Build emails visually without writing HTML.

features.title: A/B testing
features.description: Test broadcasts and flows to optimize performance.

features.title: Company profiles
features.description: Account-based marketing features for B2B teams.

features.title: Lead scoring
features.description: Identify high-intent prospects based on behavior.

pros: Visual flow builder handles complex behavior-based automation
Deep product-behavior segmentation built for SaaS use cases
50+ integrations including HubSpot, Salesforce, Stripe, and Segment
Unlimited flows and team members even on the entry Growth plan
cons: No free plan, only a 14-day free trial
HubSpot, Salesforce, and Segment integrations require the higher-priced Premium plan
Email sends beyond the plan allowance incur overage charges of $100 per 100,000 emails

faqs.question: What does the Growth plan cost?
faqs.answer: $99/month billed monthly, or $79/month billed yearly, for up to 2,000 subscribers.

faqs.question: Does Encharge integrate with Salesforce?
faqs.answer: Yes, but Salesforce and HubSpot integrations are only available on the Premium plan and above.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available on both Growth and Premium plans.

faqs.question: What happens if I exceed my email sending limit?
faqs.answer: Overages are billed at $100 for every additional 100,000 emails sent.

use_cases.title: SaaS trial-to-paid conversion
use_cases.description: Trigger onboarding and conversion emails based on in-app behavior.

use_cases.title: Lead nurturing
use_cases.description: Score and nurture leads with behavior-based email sequences.

features: Webhooks, Zapier, Stripe, and Chargebee integrations

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Encharge?
paragraphs: Encharge is marketing automation software built for B2B SaaS companies. Its Flow Builder lets teams create automated journeys triggered by user behavior, such as product usage or inactivity.
It layers in segmentation by product behavior and third-party data, an HTML-free email editor, A/B testing, and account-based features like company profiles and lead scoring.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Encharge is for
paragraphs: It's built for B2B SaaS startups and digital businesses that want to automate onboarding, trial conversion, lead nurturing, and retention based on product usage data.
